answer: Vietnam's population in 2025 was estimated at 101.6 million. The country's population continues to grow, with a significant portion living in urban areas. As of 2026, Vietnam's population is around 102 million.

results.title: Vietnam Population (2026) - Worldometer
results.snippet: Vietnam 2025 population is estimated at 101,598,527 people at mid year. Vietnam population is equivalent to 1.23% of the total world population. Vietnam ranks

The **Population of Vietnam (1950 - 2026)** chart plots the total population count as of July 1 of each year, from 1950 to 2026. **Population**: Overall total population (both sexes and all ages) in the country as of July 1 of the year indicated, as estimated by the United Nations, Department of Economic and Social Affairs, Population Division.
